title: SpawnMaster
description: SpawnMaster — lets admins set a global spawn point and players teleport to it using simple commands.
body: SpawnMaster is a sleek and modern Minecraft plugin designed to manage global spawn points effortlessly. With this plugin, server admins can set a universal spawn location using /setspawn, while all players can teleport to it using /spawn. The plugin features a configurable 3-second teleport delay that cancels if the player moves, ensuring fairness and avoiding accidental teleports. Fully compatible with Paper 1.21 and Java 21, SpawnMaster integrates seamlessly with LuckPerms for permission management. Its intuitive messages, elegant formatting, and optimized code make it ideal for any SMP, mini-game, or community server seeking a professional spawn management solution. Customize delays, prefixes, and messages directly in config.yml for maximum flexibility.
